# STRAT.067 ? ADKAR Model

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** change_management
**Domain:** CHANGE_MANAGEMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Awareness, Desire, Knowledge, Ability, Reinforcement; individual change focus; sequential; barrier identification

## Application
Build awareness of need; create desire; provide knowledge; develop ability; reinforce change; identify and address barriers at each stage

## Key Values
- Individual focus
- Sequential stages
- Barrier removal
- Reinforcement
- Awareness

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, change_management
